uniswapV3MintCallback(uint256,uint256,by.details: In the implementation you must pay the pool tokens owed for the minted liquidity. The caller of this method must be checked to be a UniswapV3Pool deployed by the canonical UniswapV3Factory.

params.amount0Owed: The amount of token0 due to the pool for the minted liquidity
params.amount1Owed: The amount of token1 due to the pool for the minted liquidity
params.data: Any data passed through by the caller via the IUniswapV3PoolActions#mint call

uniswapV3SwapCallback(int256,int256,byte.details: In the implementation you must pay the pool tokens owed for the swap. The caller of this method must be checked to be a UniswapV3Pool deployed by the canonical UniswapV3Factory. amount0Delta and amount1Delta can both be 0 if no tokens were swapped.

params.amount0Delta: The amount of token0 that was sent (negative) or must be received (positive) by the pool by the end of the swap. If positive, the callback must send that amount of token0 to the pool.
params.amount1Delta: The amount of token1 that was sent (negative) or must be received (positive) by the pool by the end of the swap. If positive, the callback must send that amount of token1 to the pool.
params.data: Any data passed through by the caller via the IUniswapV3PoolActions#swap call

test_quoteAmountsForLiquidity_matchesAct.notice: Test quoted amounts match actual pool mint

test_quoteAmountsForLiquidity_priceAbove.notice: Test amounts when price is above the range (only token1 needed)

test_quoteAmountsForLiquidity_priceBelow.notice: Test amounts when price is below the range (only token0 needed)

test_quoteAmountsForLiquidity_priceInRan.notice: Test amounts when price is within the range (both tokens needed)

test_quoteAmountsForLiquidity_tickOverlo.notice: Test tick overload produces same result as sqrtPrice version

test_quoteAmountsForLiquidity_zeroLiquid.notice: Test zero liquidity returns zero amounts

test_quoteLiquidityForAmounts_matchesAct.notice: Test quoted liquidity matches actual mintable liquidity

test_quoteLiquidityForAmounts_priceAbove.notice: Test liquidity calculation when price is above range (only token1 matters)

test_quoteLiquidityForAmounts_priceBelow.notice: Test liquidity calculation when price is below range (only token0 matters)

test_quoteLiquidityForAmounts_priceInRan.notice: Test liquidity calculation when price is within range

test_quoteLiquidityForAmounts_tickOverlo.notice: Test tick overload produces same result

test_quoteLiquidityForAmounts_zeroAmount.notice: Test zero amounts returns zero liquidity

test_roundTrip_amountsToLiquidityToAmoun.notice: Test that amounts → liquidity → amounts round-trips correctly

test_roundTrip_liquidityToAmountsToLiqui.notice: Test that liquidity → amounts → liquidity round-trips correctly

uniswapV3MintCallback(uint256,uint256,by.notice: Called to `msg.sender` after minting liquidity to a position from IUniswapV3Pool#mint.

uniswapV3SwapCallback(int256,int256,byte.notice: Called to `msg.sender` after executing a swap via IUniswapV3Pool#swap.
